Off Calendar Sep-10-2003 Off Calendar

Dpu Scd 218 At 9:00 Am. On June 12, 2003.
Off Calendar Aug-19-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/V. Mack, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Appearances:
Howard Mencher, Esq. for Plaintiff Howard Churchill, also present, was sworn & examined.
Plaintiff Exhibit #1 - Letter from pltf to deft dated 3/6/01. ID/EVID.
Plaintiff Exhibit #2 - 2 pages, email deft to pltf dated 4/18/01. ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's testimony, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant.
Counsel to prepare proposed judgment.
